content.text:
cd /workspace/project/tb-difficulty-tuner && export WANDB_API_KEY="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" && export PINECONE_API_KEY="pcsk_3Vsf8s_UoX9xAA4AzvCu6kJFoAYxMs33WKzL3VdtgMpK2tSQUodh3oVBM62BnSZn22Zgzr" && python3 << 'EOF'
import os
import json
from pinecone import Pinecone
pc = Pinecone(api_key=os.environ["PINECONE_API_KEY"])
# Let's look at the agent-task-benchmark index more closely - it has steps!
print("=== agent-task-benchmark: trials namespace ===")
index = pc.Index("agent-task-benchmark")
# List vectors in trials namespace
trials_list = index.list(namespace="trials", limit=10)
print(f"Sample trial IDs: {list(trials_list)[:5]}")
# Fetch a few trials with full metadata
if trials_list:
    trial_ids = [str(t) for t in list(trials_list)[:3]]
    fetched = index.fetch(ids=trial_ids, namespace="trials")
    for tid, vec in fetched.vectors.items():
        print(f"\n--- Trial: {tid} ---")
        meta = vec.metadata
        print(f"  task_name: {meta.get('task_name')}")
        print(f"  agent_name: {meta.get('agent_name')}")
        print(f"  model_name: {meta.get('model_name')}")
        print(f"  passed: {meta.get('passed')}")
        print(f"  reward: {meta.get('reward')}")
        print(f"  n_steps: {meta.get('n_steps')}")
        print(f"  n_tool_calls: {meta.get('n_tool_calls')}")
        print(f"  duration_sec: {meta.get('duration_sec')}")
        print(f"  error_type: {meta.get('error_type')}")
        print(f"  unique_tools: {meta.get('unique_tools')}")
print("\n\n=== agent-task-benchmark: steps namespace ===")
steps_list = index.list(namespace="steps", limit=10)
print(f"Sample step IDs: {list(steps_list)[:5]}")
if steps_list:
    step_ids = [str(s) for s in list(steps_list)[:3]]
    fetched_steps = index.fetch(ids=step_ids, namespace="steps")
    for sid, vec in fetched_steps.vectors.items():
        print(f"\n--- Step: {sid} ---")
        meta = vec.metadata
        for k, v in meta.items():
            val_str = str(v)[:200] + "..." if len(str(v)) > 200 else str(v)
            print(f"  {k}: {val_str}")
EOF

# Fetch a few trials with full metadata

if steps_list:
